find.match_belief: Wearables become creative when someone would wear them even if nobody was watching. That's when you've truly made something.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Your tool becomes real when other artists can't imagine working without it. That's how you make your ideas infinite.
profile.working_on: Creating tools that let musicians layer sampled everyday sounds—doors, breaks, rain—into live performance compositions on the fly

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to empower creativity, enabling artists to weave the fabric of everyday life into their musical expressions.
